description: Use this API to return voltage droop control integer parameters. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.3.0. ierr, ival = voltagedroopint(name, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the voltage droop control quantity desired. (input).

string.description: regulated bus of voltage droop control.
actual regulated bus of voltage droop control.

error_codes.description: voltage droop control ‘NAME’ not found; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
